messages.text: that mirror selfie said final boss more than tester aisle
terrified actually, my screen brightness flinched first
blame the brightness, not the self control huh
self control clocked out when you posted that fitted in ulta
dramatic, you flirting with foundations now or what

exactly, you pulled up cozy and still broke the aisle
cute speech, you rehearse these in the shower or car

field research is crazy wording for a date
saturday night. i'll pick you up
that's not an answer you're getting today
